name: srm-create-settlement
goal: Create an SRM settlement document through a reviewed, approval-gated change-flow Recording Pack.
expectedResult: SRM settlement creation evidence is captured with settlement number and success message after explicit human approval.

params.name: vendor
params.description: Supplier or vendor identifier used to query eligible settlement items.

params.name: company_code
params.description: Company code for the settlement query.

params.name: purchasing_org
params.description: Purchasing organization for the settlement query.

params.name: settlement_desc
params.description: Settlement document description or business label.

params.name: year_month
params.description: Settlement period in approved business format, for example YYYYMM.

params.name: external_agent
params.description: External agent value when required by currency or SRM business rule.
